creator: christer.edwards@gmail.com
text:
I need to come back around to getting this port completed. Until that time, a few notes.

I initially ignored the devel/py-pyinotify dependency based on my understanding of inotify-vs-kqueue compatibility and capabilities. I would like to revisit and do further testing.

I would appreciate any feedback and assistance on getting Hubble packaged for FreeBSD. Hopefully, I can find some time this weekend to dig into my pending ports tickets.
